title: CLR Operating Hours
content: The Covenant University Centre for Learning Resources (CLR) is open Monday to Friday from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM, and Saturday from 9:00 AM to 6:00 PM. The library is closed on Sundays and public holidays. During examination periods, the library extends its hours to midnight on weekdays. The reading rooms are accessible 24/7 with a valid student ID card.

title: Book Borrowing Policy
content: Undergraduate students can borrow up to 4 books at a time for a period of 2 weeks. Postgraduate students can borrow up to 6 books for 3 weeks. Academic staff may borrow up to 10 books for one semester. Books can be renewed online or at the circulation desk. Overdue fines apply for late returns.

title: Book Renewal and Returns
content: Books can be renewed a maximum of 2 times if not reserved by another user. Renewals can be done via the CLR portal under 'My Account'. Returns can be made at book drop boxes or the circulation desk.

title: Online Databases and E-Journals
content: The CLR provides access to JSTOR, IEEE Xplore, ScienceDirect, Scopus, Web of Science, EBSCOhost, and other academic databases. On-campus access is direct, while off-campus access requires VPN credentials from the ICT Directorate.

title: E-Book Collections
content: The library provides access to over 50,000 e-books via platforms such as SpringerLink, Wiley Online Library, and the Covenant University Institutional Repository. E-books can be read online or downloaded for limited periods.

title: Library Membership and Registration
content: All registered students and staff are automatically library members. First-time users must complete orientation and present their student ID card to obtain access. Lost library cards attract replacement fees.

title: Photocopy and Printing Services
content: Printing and photocopy services are available at the CLR Business Centre. Costs include N20 per page (black & white), N50 per page (color), and N10 per scanned page. The centre operates on weekdays from 8:00 AM to 8:00 PM.

title: Study Rooms and Spaces
content: The CLR provides individual carrels, group study rooms, and postgraduate reading rooms. Group rooms accommodate 4–8 people and can be booked for up to 2 hours. Postgraduate reading rooms require valid postgraduate ID.

title: Computer and Internet Access
content: Over 100 computer workstations are available for student use with 1-hour session limits during peak times. Free Wi-Fi is available throughout the library.

title: Library Rules and Conduct
content: Users must maintain silence in reading areas. Mobile phones must be silent. Food and drinks are not allowed except in designated areas. Bags must be deposited at the cloakroom. Dress code applies within the library.

title: Research and Reference Services
content: The CLR provides research assistance including literature searches, citation guidance, and database usage support. Consultations can be booked or accessed via walk-in sessions.

title: Turnitin and Plagiarism Checking
content: Students can submit documents for plagiarism checks using Turnitin. Each student is entitled to two free checks, with additional checks attracting a fee.

title: Searching the Library Catalogue (OPAC)
content: The OPAC system allows users to search for books by title, author, subject, or keyword. It displays availability and call numbers for physical location.

title: Library Classification System
content: The library uses the Library of Congress Classification system including categories such as Q (Science), T (Technology), H (Social Sciences), and P (Language).

title: Covenant University LMS
content: The LMS (lms.covenantuniversity.edu.ng) provides access to course materials, assignments, and lecture content. Login uses student credentials.

title: Digital Learning Resources
content: Students have access to LinkedIn Learning, Coursera for Campus, and Khan Academy for additional skill development and certification.

title: CLR Contact Information
content: Centre for Learning Resources, Covenant University, Ota, Ogun State, Nigeria. Email: clr@covenantuniversity.edu.ng. Phone: +234 1-2909999.

title: Special Collections and Archives
content: The CLR houses rare books, manuscripts, and institutional repositories. Access requires approval from the Head Librarian.

title: Inter-Library Loans
content: Users can request books not available in CLR through inter-library loans. Processing takes 5–10 working days.

title: Library Orientation and Training
content: The CLR organizes orientation for new students and monthly workshops on research skills, databases, and citation management.

title: CLR Homepage Overview
content: The CLR homepage provides access to search tools, collections, digital resources, and guides for students, alumni, and researchers.

title: Research Data and Historical Resources
content: The CLR provides access to datasets and historical resources including Nigerian elections data, African civilizations, global terrorism data, and world population statistics.

title: Digital Mental Health Resources
content: The CLR provides access to academic articles on teletherapy, telepsychiatry, digital mental health interventions, and AI in healthcare research.

title: Academic Database Directory
content: The CLR provides access to major academic databases including Cambridge University Press, IEEE Xplore, Scopus, Web of Science, JSTOR, ProQuest, ScienceDirect, and DOAJ.

title: Digital Productivity Tools
content: The CLR provides access to Google Workspace, Microsoft 365, Grammarly, Zoom, Turnitin, MATLAB, Moodle, and CSIS IT Support services.

title: Library News and Updates
content: The CLR shares updates on research grants, training opportunities, and academic support programs including Web of Science workshops and ACU gender grants.

title: Library Events and Workshops
content: The CLR hosts events such as research training, InCites benchmarking sessions, and Web of Science workshops to improve academic research skills.

title: CLR Staff Directory
content: The CLR staff includes directors, division heads, and librarians across acquisitions, digital systems, preservation, readers services, and technical services divisions.

title: Library Services Overview
content: The CLR offers services including lending, digital access, research support, learning spaces, ICT integration, and academic assistance.

title: Library Location and Access
content: The CLR is located at Covenant University, Ota, Ogun State. It provides physical and digital access to resources for students, staff, and researchers.
